turns.user_message: I feel this weird hollowness in my chest that I can't shake. It's like I'm just numb inside.
That empty feeling is just there all the time now and nothing fills it. I don't even look forward to things anymore.
I'm starting to think I should talk to someone about this constant emptiness. It's just not going away on its own.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by describing a physical feeling.
